top.title: Deal with US not imminent, Iran says
top.summary: The Iranian foreign minister's comments come after the US secretary of state said an agreement could be announced on Monday.

top.title: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
top.summary: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.

top.title: She was told to marry in a country which bans girls' education. So she got in a taxi and fled
top.summary: Nearly five years on from Afghanistan's school ban, young women say they have waved goodbye to their dreams.

top.title: AI may speed up search for drugs to treat brain conditions
top.summary: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.

top.title: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
top.summary: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".

top.title: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
top.summary: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.
